title: eurybia sibirica var. gigantea
intro: Eurybia sibirica var. gigantea, also known as the giant Russian eurybia, is a subspecies of the Eurybia sibirica plant, which belongs to the Asteraceae family and is native to Siberia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eurybia sibirica var. gigantea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and aid in the treatment of various skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions or taken internally to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation.
